skill.name: visual-html-gen-ui
skill.description: Use when an agent needs standalone HTML chart examples for a specific domain, especially to design data-rich UI artifacts without loading a large chart library into context.

domains.name: Finance
domains.summary: Capital markets, investment research, portfolio analytics, risk, and private-market operating metrics.

charts.title: Line Chart
charts.purpose: Show price, NAV, revenue, or macro trend changes over time.

charts.title: Area Chart
charts.purpose: Emphasize accumulated scale such as AUM, deposits, or net inflows.

charts.title: Grouped Bar Chart
charts.purpose: Compare multiple companies, quarters, or scenarios side by side.

charts.title: Stacked Bar Chart
charts.purpose: Break revenue, holdings, or portfolio exposure into components.

charts.title: Donut Allocation
charts.purpose: Summarize asset allocation, sector weight, or capital deployment.

charts.title: Risk Return Scatter
charts.purpose: Position strategies or assets by volatility and return.

charts.title: Valuation Bubble
charts.purpose: Compare valuation, growth, and market capitalization in one view.

charts.title: Sector Rotation Heatmap
charts.purpose: Track sector strength, factor rotation, or weekly flows.

charts.title: Market Map Treemap
charts.purpose: Show market capitalization or portfolio weight by company and sector.

charts.title: Candlestick Chart
charts.purpose: Display OHLC market action for trader-facing views.

charts.title: Depth Chart
charts.purpose: Visualize bid and ask liquidity around the current price.

charts.title: Drawdown Chart
charts.purpose: Expose peak-to-trough losses for a fund or strategy.

charts.title: Equity Curve
charts.purpose: Show cumulative strategy or fund growth over time.

charts.title: Rolling Sharpe
charts.purpose: Track risk-adjusted return quality through time.

charts.title: Efficient Frontier
charts.purpose: Compare portfolio choices by expected return and volatility.

charts.title: Monte Carlo Fan
charts.purpose: Present a range of possible future portfolio paths.

charts.title: Deal Funnel
charts.purpose: Summarize VC or lending pipeline conversion by stage.

charts.title: Capital Flow Sankey
charts.purpose: Show how capital moves between sources, vehicles, and uses.

charts.title: Correlation Matrix
charts.purpose: Expose relationships between assets, factors, or sectors.

charts.title: Factor Exposure
charts.purpose: Show portfolio sensitivity to value, momentum, quality, and size.

charts.title: Risk Attribution
charts.purpose: Break total risk into sector, factor, security, and currency drivers.

charts.title: Waterfall Profit Bridge
charts.purpose: Explain movement from revenue to net income or EBITDA.

charts.title: Tornado Sensitivity
charts.purpose: Rank model assumptions by effect on valuation or IRR.

charts.title: Company Score Radar
charts.purpose: Score a company or fund across multiple qualitative dimensions.

charts.title: Calendar Heatmap
charts.purpose: Show daily returns, trading activity, or cash movement intensity.

charts.title: Yield Curve
charts.purpose: Display rates across maturities for macro and fixed-income analysis.

charts.title: Cap Table
charts.purpose: Present ownership, share classes, and dilution after financing.

charts.title: Cohort Retention
charts.purpose: Analyze customer or portfolio cohort quality over time.

charts.title: Unit Economics
charts.purpose: Compare CAC, LTV, payback, gross margin, and burn efficiency.

charts.title: VaR Stress Test
charts.purpose: Show expected loss bands under normal and stressed scenarios.

domains.name: Office
domains.summary: Workplace productivity, meetings, task execution, communication, approvals, and team operations.

charts.title: Meeting Load Timeline
charts.purpose: Show how meeting hours change by week or team.

charts.title: Task Status Stacked Bar
charts.purpose: Break planned work into done, in progress, blocked, and deferred states.

charts.title: Calendar Heatmap
charts.purpose: Reveal high-pressure days for meetings, deadlines, or handoffs.

charts.title: Email Response Funnel
charts.purpose: Track message conversion from sent to opened, replied, and resolved.

charts.title: Document Flow Sankey
charts.purpose: Visualize how documents move between draft, review, approval, and archive.

charts.title: Team Capacity Bars
charts.purpose: Compare available capacity against committed workload by team.

charts.title: Approval Waterfall
charts.purpose: Explain cycle-time additions from review, legal, finance, and executive approval.

charts.title: Workspace Utilization Heatmap
charts.purpose: Show desk, room, or location utilization patterns.

charts.title: Knowledge Base Treemap
charts.purpose: Map documentation coverage by department or topic area.

charts.title: Workload Risk Radar
charts.purpose: Score teams across urgency, ambiguity, dependency, load, and morale risk.

domains.name: Education
domains.summary: Learning progress, classroom operations, curriculum quality, assessment, and student support analytics.

charts.title: Learning Progress Line
charts.purpose: Show mastery or completion growth across a semester.

charts.title: Grade Distribution Bars
charts.purpose: Compare score bands across classes, sections, or terms.

charts.title: Mastery Heatmap
charts.purpose: Map skill mastery by module and learner group.

charts.title: Attendance Calendar
charts.purpose: Reveal daily attendance, absence, or participation intensity.

charts.title: Cohort Retention
charts.purpose: Track student retention or course completion by intake cohort.

charts.title: Curriculum Coverage Treemap
charts.purpose: Show instructional time or content weight by curriculum area.

charts.title: Intervention Funnel
charts.purpose: Track students from flagged risk to outreach, support, and recovery.

charts.title: Learning Path Sankey
charts.purpose: Show how learners move across tracks, modules, and outcomes.

charts.title: Rubric Score Radar
charts.purpose: Summarize student or class performance across rubric dimensions.

charts.title: Assessment Stress Test
charts.purpose: Compare performance under standard, timed, and advanced assessment conditions.

domains.name: Health
domains.summary: Patient monitoring, care operations, population health, appointment flow, and clinical quality views.

charts.title: Vitals Trend Line
charts.purpose: Track a patient metric such as glucose, heart rate, or blood pressure over time.

charts.title: Symptom Severity Area
charts.purpose: Emphasize cumulative symptom burden or recovery progress.

charts.title: Patient Flow Funnel
charts.purpose: Summarize intake, triage, consult, treatment, and discharge conversion.

charts.title: Appointment Calendar
charts.purpose: Show appointment density, no-shows, or follow-up adherence by day.

charts.title: Ward Utilization Heatmap
charts.purpose: Reveal bed, room, or clinician utilization by time block.

charts.title: Care Pathway Sankey
charts.purpose: Visualize patient movement across referral, diagnosis, treatment, and follow-up.

charts.title: Population Risk Scatter
charts.purpose: Position patient groups by risk score and cost or complexity.

charts.title: Treatment Response Cohort
charts.purpose: Track response or adherence cohorts over follow-up periods.

charts.title: Clinical Quality Radar
charts.purpose: Score a program across safety, access, experience, efficacy, and cost.

charts.title: Readmission Stress Test
charts.purpose: Compare expected readmission or complication losses under stress scenarios.

domains.name: Ecommerce
domains.summary: Online retail conversion, merchandising, inventory, customer value, promotions, and fulfillment analytics.

charts.title: Revenue Line
charts.purpose: Show gross merchandise value or revenue trend over time.

charts.title: Checkout Funnel
charts.purpose: Track shoppers through product view, cart, checkout, payment, and purchase.

charts.title: Category Sales Stacked Bar
charts.purpose: Break sales into category, channel, or region components.

charts.title: Product Margin Waterfall
charts.purpose: Explain margin from list price through discounts, shipping, returns, and fees.

charts.title: Inventory Heatmap
charts.purpose: Reveal stock risk by SKU and warehouse or region.

charts.title: Customer Cohort Retention
charts.purpose: Track repeat purchase retention by acquisition cohort.

charts.title: LTV CAC KPI
charts.purpose: Compare acquisition efficiency, LTV, payback, and contribution margin.

charts.title: Basket Affinity Sankey
charts.purpose: Show product pairings and category paths in baskets.

charts.title: SKU Performance Treemap
charts.purpose: Map SKU revenue or contribution by product family.

charts.title: Promo Sensitivity Tornado
charts.purpose: Rank price, discount, shipping, and ad spend assumptions by profit effect.

domains.name: Social

charts.title: Active Users Line
charts.purpose: Track DAU, WAU, or MAU growth across a period.

charts.title: Engagement Area
charts.purpose: Emphasize accumulated sessions, reactions, comments, or shares.

charts.title: Activation Funnel
charts.purpose: Track users from signup to profile completion, first follow, first post, and return.

charts.title: Creator Network Sankey

charts.title: Topic Heatmap

charts.title: Community Treemap

charts.title: User Cohort Retention

charts.title: Influence Bubble

charts.title: Moderation Waterfall

charts.title: Community Health Radar

charts.title: Box Office Stacked Bar
charts.purpose: Break revenue by market, format, or week.

charts.title: Audience Retention Cohort

charts.title: Release Calendar Heatmap
charts.purpose: Show release density, campaigns, or audience activity by day.

charts.title: Genre Momentum Heatmap

charts.title: Playlist Flow Sankey

charts.title: Talent Score Radar

charts.title: Campaign Funnel

charts.title: Title Portfolio Treemap

charts.title: DAU Line

charts.title: Matchmaking Heatmap

charts.title: Player Retention Cohort

charts.title: Item Sales Treemap

charts.title: Balance Tornado

charts.title: Player Segment Radar

charts.title: Monetization KPI

charts.title: Service Margin Waterfall

charts.title: Customer Retention Cohort

charts.title: SLA Calendar

charts.title: Portfolio Treemap
charts.purpose: Map revenue or effort by account, segment, or service line.

charts.title: Sales Efficiency KPI
charts.purpose: Compare CAC, payback, expansion, win rate, and burn efficiency.

domains.name: Cybersecurity
domains.summary: Threat detection, incidents, vulnerability management, risk posture, response operations, and control health.

charts.title: Incident Line
charts.purpose: Track incidents, alerts, or suspicious activity through time.

charts.title: Severity Stacked Bar
charts.purpose: Break findings into critical, high, medium, and low severity.

charts.title: Attack Path Sankey
charts.purpose: Show attacker movement from entry vector to lateral movement and objective.

charts.title: Vulnerability Heatmap
charts.purpose: Map vulnerability count or risk by asset class and severity.

charts.title: Response Funnel
charts.purpose: Track alerts from triggered to triaged, investigated, contained, and resolved.

charts.title: Asset Risk Treemap
charts.purpose: Map risk contribution by application, host, or business unit.

charts.title: Control Maturity Radar
charts.purpose: Score identity, endpoint, network, detection, backup, and training controls.

charts.title: Phishing Calendar
charts.purpose: Reveal phishing activity or training completion by day.

charts.title: Risk Reduction Waterfall
charts.purpose: Explain risk movement from new findings, patches, compensating controls, and exceptions.

charts.title: Breach Stress Test
charts.purpose: Compare estimated losses under baseline, ransomware, data leak, and outage scenarios.

domains.name: AI Agent

charts.title: Task Success Line
charts.purpose: Track agent task success rate across eval runs or product releases.

charts.title: Latency Area
charts.purpose: Emphasize cumulative latency or runtime cost across workflow stages.

charts.title: Tool Use Sankey
charts.purpose: Show agent movement between planning, search, code, browser, and verification tools.

charts.title: Eval Heatmap
charts.purpose: Map pass rate by task family and capability dimension.

charts.title: Failure Funnel
charts.purpose: Track failures from detected issue to repro, root cause, fix, and verified pass.

charts.title: Model Cost Scatter
charts.purpose: Position models or prompts by quality and cost.

charts.title: Agent Cohort Retention
charts.purpose: Track repeat workflow success by task cohort over versions.

charts.title: Capability Radar
charts.purpose: Score an agent across planning, tool use, coding, browsing, safety, and memory.

charts.title: Token Waterfall
charts.purpose: Explain token use from system context, retrieved docs, reasoning, tool output, and answer.

charts.title: Safety Stress Test
charts.purpose: Compare failure rates under normal, adversarial, long-context, and tool-error scenarios.
